calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2005 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-20-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-20-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-01-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joe Vickstein.
Brian Carter, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Xiangyu Xiao and Anna Olivier.
Robert Cross, Esq. for Defendant: Cheryl Lane ind. and Harmon, Lane & Posey, et al.
11:30 a.m. Counsels and parties are present and reached a settlement, terms read into the record as follows: Defendant agreed to a settlement in the sum of $7,000.00 without deduction for both plaintiffs. $5,000.00 will be paid with in 7 days to the Trust account of Carter & Carter, the balance of $2,000.00 will be paid befor Dec. 31, 2004 to same account.
Plaintiffs will dismissed the action with prejudice.
Judgment shall only be entered upon breached.
Mr. Cross to prepare the Stip. for entry of Judgment and fax to Mr. Carter today.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.
Matter is placed on CRC225 Calendar on Feb. 1, 2005 at 10:00 a.m. in Dept. 212 for Dismissal.
